name: backlot
description: The repo-aware environment broker: puts a working, seeded, provable instance of your web application in front of coding agents and humans — warm pools, leases, bind-by-sync. Brokers environments; never provides them.

scripts.coverage: npm run build && rm -rf coverage && NODE_V8_COVERAGE="$PWD/coverage/tmp" vitest run; c8 report --temp-directory coverage/tmp --report-dir coverage --reporter text --reporter lcov --exclude-after-remap --include 'src/**'

author: Christian Kohlberg
